name: Chocolate Malt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter and sugar in a bowl.
2. Using an electric mixer, beat together the butter and sugar until the mixture is light and creamy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. In a separate bowl, combine flour, cocoa, malted milk powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk, until all are just incorporated.
6. Pour the batter into two greased and floured 8-inch cake pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Frosting: Whip the cream until stiff peaks form, then fold in the remaining ingredients until smooth.
